member.name: T:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.AESClientCryptography
member.summary: 客户端加密接口 通过AES对数据进行加密，生成相关密文

member.name: M:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.BasicAuthenticationHandler.HandleAuthenticateAsync
member.summary: 重写HandleAuthenticateAsync()方法 ， 进行主流程的控制。

member.name: M:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.DefaultCheckClient.Check(System.String,System.String,Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpRequest)
member.summary: 1.查找应用信息 2.验证ip 3.验证应用和密码

member.name: M:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.DefaultRolesProvider.GetRolesAsync(System.String)
member.summary: 判断当前应用具有的角色信息

member.name: T:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.DESClientCryptography
member.summary: 客户端加密接口 通过DES对数据进行加密，生成相关密文

member.name: T:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.IClientCryptography
member.summary: 客户端加密接口 通过相应加密方法对数据进行加密，生成相关密文

member.name: M:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.IRolesProvider.GetRolesAsync(System.String)
member.summary: 根据用户名获取角色信息

member.name: M:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.ProviderAuthorizationHandler.HandleRequirementAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authorization.AuthorizationHandlerContext,ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.ProviderRequirement)
member.summary: 授权处理。读取角色，并判断当前角色是否具有对应资源的权限。

member.name: T:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.RolesAuthorityComparer
member.summary: 角色拥有权限比较器，用于将用户权限合并时的比较。controller和action相同则认为相同

member.name: T:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.controller.BackgroundLogController
member.summary: 后台任务执行情况查询

member.name: M:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.controller.BackgroundLogController.Get(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: 查询后台任务执行日志

member.name: M:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.controller.LogManagerController.Get(System.String,System.String,ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.LogDirectory)
member.param: 日期。不传默认为当天。格式2021-10-20.
日志级别，不传默认为Error: 0：Trace 1：Debug 2：Info 3：Warn 4: Error 5：Critical 6：Fatal

member.name: M:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.controller.LogManagerController.GetFiles(System.String,ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.LogDirectory)
member.summary: 列出对应日志界别下包含得所有日志文件名
member.param: 日志级别，不传默认为Error: 0：Trace 1：Debug 2：Info 3：Warn 4: Error 5：Critical 6：Fatal

member.name: M:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.controller.LogManagerController.DeleteFiles(System.String,ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.LogDirectory)
member.summary: 删除对应日志目录下得所有日志
member.param: 日志级别，不传默认为Error: 0：Trace 1：Debug 2：Info 3：Warn 4: Error 5：Critical 6：Fatal

member.name: M:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.CacheManagerController.RefreshCache(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: 更新某一个key的缓存 application:应用缓存 white:白名单缓存（添加ip一般更新该内容即可） black:黑名单缓存 auth:角色权限缓存 role:角色缓存

member.name: T:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.DefaultOptions
member.summary: 系统框架默认需要的配置信息

member.name: P:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.DefaultOptions.DefaultConnectionString
member.summary: 默认数据库连接字符串

member.name: P:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.DefaultOptions.VisitLogSleepTime
member.summary: 批量日志记录的时间间隔，默认30秒

member.name: P:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.DefaultOptions.CheckTimestamp
member.summary: 验证用户是否需要检测timestamp

member.name: P:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.DefaultOptions.ValidSeconds
member.summary: 验证时间戳与服务器时间相差多少秒认为有效，默认300

member.name: P:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.DefaultOptions.AdminSecret
member.summary: 管理密钥，用于调用管理接口

member.name: M:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.ExtensionHelper.UseThirdNetMvc(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.IApplicationBuilder,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILoggerFactory)
member.summary: 启用三网默认接口服务 1.配置日志记录 2.配置全局异常处理 4.配置token认证 5.配置basic认证 6.配置访问日志记录 7.配置黑名单 8.添加限流 9.启动后台任务

member.name: M:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.ExtensionHelper.UseThirdNetMvcWithNoAuth(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.IApplicationBuilder,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILoggerFactory)
member.summary: 启用三网默认接口服务 1.配置日志记录 2.配置全局异常处理 3.配置访问日志记录 4.启动后台任务

member.name: M:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.ExtensionHelper.UseThirdNetStaticFileServer(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.IApplicationBuilder,Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.StaticFileOptions)
member.summary: 启用文件服务，提供文件下载 UseFileServer combines the functionality of UseStaticFiles, UseDefaultFiles, and UseDirectoryBrowser.

member.name: M:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.ExtensionHelper.AddThirdNetMvcWithOpenGuass(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,System.String,Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authentication.JwtBearer.JwtBearerEvents)
member.summary: 配置基本参数 1.设置当前目录 2.设置解决控制台乱码 3.配置mvc

member.name: M:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.ExtensionHelper.AddThirdNetMvcWithPostgresql(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,System.String,Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authentication.JwtBearer.JwtBearerEvents)
member.summary: 配置基本参数 1.设置当前目录 2.设置解决控制台乱码 3.配置mvc

member.name: M:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.ExtensionHelper.AddThirdNetMvcWithMysql(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,System.String,Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authentication.JwtBearer.JwtBearerEvents)
member.summary: 配置基本参数 1.设置当前目录 2.设置解决控制台乱码 3.配置mvc

member.name: M:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.ExtensionHelper.AddThirdNetMvcWithSqlServer(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,System.String,Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authentication.JwtBearer.JwtBearerEvents)
member.summary: 配置基本参数 1.设置当前目录 2.设置解决控制台乱码 3.配置mvc

member.name: M:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.ExtensionHelper.ToPageListAsync``1(System.Linq.IQueryable{``0},System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.param: 数据总数，根据是否为空判断是否需要进行求和操作。 若count为null则执行Count操作，否则不执行。

member.name: M:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.ExtensionHelper.ToPageListAsync``2(System.Linq.IQueryable{``0},AutoMapper.IMapper,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: 对query进行分页处理,同时使用automapper进行类型转换
member.param: 数据总数，根据是否为空判断是否需要进行求和操作。 若count为null则执行Count操作，否则不执行。

member.name: M:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.ExtensionHelper.GetAllFunctions(System.IServiceProvider)
member.summary: 获取系统提供的所有服务. 无法获取帮助文档隐藏的服务。

member.name: T:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.AccountTokenCheckMiddleware
member.summary: 确认token发布后是否用户信息有修改。

member.name: M:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.AccountTokenCheckMiddleware.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.AccountTokenCheckMiddleware},ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.IGetAccountTokenKey,ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.IAccountTokenTimeCache,Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.RequestDelegate)
member.summary: 构造函数，注入日志，缓存等信息

member.name: M:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.AccountTokenCheckMiddleware.Invoke(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext)
member.summary: 判断当前ip是否在黑名单中

member.name: T:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.BlackIpMiddleware
member.summary: 黑名单中间件，用于判断当前请求ip是否在黑名单中

member.name: F:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.BlackIpMiddleware._cache
member.summary: 黑名单缓存列表，用于存放黑名单列表

member.name: M:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.BlackIpMiddleware.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.BlackIpMiddleware},ThirdNet.Core.Common.ISessionReader{System.String,ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.IpBlackList},Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.RequestDelegate)
member.summary: 构造函数，注入日志，缓存等信息

member.name: M:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.BlackIpMiddleware.Invoke(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext)
member.summary: 判断当前ip是否在黑名单中

member.name: T:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.CustomExceptionFilter
member.summary: 异常处理。通用异常应通过middleware实现 除非为了提供与通用异常不同的定制方案 Filters are a part of MVC, and have access to its context and constructs. For instance, middleware can't easily detect whether model validation on a request has generated errors, and respond accordingly, but a filter can easily do so.

member.name: M:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.CustomExceptionFilter.OnException(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.Filters.ExceptionContext)
member.summary: 对controller中抛出的异常进行处理 若为WebApiException，则表示已经处理，则直接获取code和message 若为其他异常，则表示未经处理，则返回500错误。

member.name: T:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.DatabaseVisitLogger
member.summary: 数据库中记录访问日志

member.name: F:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.DatabaseVisitLogger._bulk
member.summary: 批量数据库导入数据接口

member.name: M:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.DatabaseVisitLogger.#ctor(ThirdNet.Core.Common.IDbAsyncBulk,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,Microsoft.Extensions.Options.IOptions{ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.DefaultOptions})
member.summary: 构造函数，依赖注入，数据库接口，日志记录，配置信息

member.name: P:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.DatabaseVisitLogger.Check
member.summary: 当前临时列表是否有数据

member.name: T:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.DefaultResultHeaderFilter
member.summary: 默认相应消息头筛选器

member.name: T:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.DefaultVisitLogger
member.summary: 默认日志记录，仅使用系统的ILogger记录

member.name: T:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.IAccountTokenTimeCache
member.summary: 账号对应token的更新时间缓存，用于判断token是否过期

member.name: M:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.IAccountTokenTimeCache.TryGet(System.String,System.DateTime@)
member.summary: 查找对应用户名key对应的时间。

member.name: T:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.Obsolete.IApiVersionReader
member.summary: 读取客户端当前使用的api版本信息接口

member.name: T:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.NpgsqlVisitLogRunner
member.summary: 基于postgresql的访问日志批处理

member.name: M:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.NpgsqlVisitLogRunner.#ctor(ThirdNet.Core.Common.IDbAsyncBulk,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.NpgsqlVisitLogRunner},Microsoft.Extensions.Options.IOptions{ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.DefaultOptions})

member.name: T:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.OpenGuassVisitLogRunner
member.summary: 基于postgresql的访问日志批处理

member.name: M:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.OpenGuassVisitLogRunner.#ctor(ThirdNet.Core.Common.IDbAsyncBulk,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.OpenGuassVisitLogRunner},Microsoft.Extensions.Options.IOptions{ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.DefaultOptions})

member.name: T:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.RequestLoggerMiddleware
member.summary: 日志记录中间件，用于记录访问日志 1.middleware处理前发生异常->直接进入全局错误处理 2.controller抛出异常->进入exceptionfileter处理。 3.middleware处理后发生异常，则会无法正常响应。

member.name: M:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.RequestLoggerMiddleware.#ctor(ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.IVisitLogger,Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.RequestDelegate)
member.summary: 日志记录中间件，用于记录访问日志

member.name: M:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.RequestLoggerMiddleware.Invoke(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext)
member.summary: 记录访问日志 先执行方法，后对执行的结果以及请求信息通过IVisitLogger进行日志记录

member.name: T:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.ResourceFilter
member.summary: 第二个执行的Filter。 可以实现相关缓存

member.name: T:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.ResultHeaderAttribute
member.summary: 最后一个筛选器，位于其他筛选器之后 返回的http头信息

member.name: M:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.ResultHeaderAttribute.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: 传入需要添加的http头信息

member.name: M:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.ResultHeaderAttribute.OnResultExecuting(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.Filters.ResultExecutingContext)
member.summary: 生成结果时，添加响应头

member.summary: 初始化sql server数据库映射

member.summary: 日志记录中间件，用于记录访问日志

member.name: T:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.TestApplicationConfigurationCache
member.summary: 测试应用程序信息缓存。仅用于测试，提供swkj_test用户

member.name: T:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.TestCheckClient
member.summary: 测试应用认证 用户名与密码相等则认证通过

member.name: M:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.TestCheckClient.Check(System.String,System.String,Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpRequest)
member.summary: 用户名密码相等则通过

member.name: T:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.TestIpBlackListCache
member.summary: 测试黑名单，仅返回空集合

member.name: T:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.TestRolesAuthorityCache
member.summary: 测试权限缓存 默认返回admin权限

member.name: T:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.TestRolesProvider
member.summary: 测试用户权限 返回admin作为角色

member.name: M:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.IJtiCheck.CheckAndUse(System.String,System.DateTime)
member.summary: 使用refresh token获取新token时调用，验证该refresh token是否已经被使用。
member.param: refresh_token的过期时间，过期后就不需要保存了

member.name: M:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.InMemoryJtiCheck.CheckAndUse(System.String,System.DateTime)
member.summary: 使用refresh token获取新token时调用，验证该refresh token是否已经被使用。
member.param: refresh_token的过期时间，过期后就不需要保存了

member.name: P:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.ApplicationInfo.RolesList
member.summary: 该应用拥有的角色列表列表

member.name: M:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.IpWhiteListCache.#ctor(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContextOptions{ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.ThirdNetDbContext},Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.IpWhiteListCache})

member.summary: 传入日志记录器和配置

member.name: P:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.IpBlackList.Duration
member.summary: 黑名单封停时间，单位：小时

member.name: P:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.RolesInfo.ApplicationList
member.summary: 拥有该权限的应用信息

member.name: T:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.MultipartData
member.summary: multipart上传数据，包括文件列表和字符数据列表

member.name: T:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.MultipartRequestHelper
member.summary: multipart帮助类，用于解析上传的数据

member.name: M:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.MultipartRequestHelper.GetBoundary(Microsoft.Net.Http.Headers.MediaTypeHeaderValue,System.Int32)
member.summary: 获取边界 Content-Type: multipart/form-data; boundary="----WebKitFormBoundarymx2fSWqWSd0OxQqq" 默认长度70以内

member.name: M:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.MultipartRequestHelper.IsMultipartContentType(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpRequest)
member.summary: 当前请求是否是Multipart请求。即ContentType是否以multipart/开头。

member.name: M:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.MultipartRequestHelper.HasFormDataContentDisposition(Microsoft.Net.Http.Headers.ContentDispositionHeaderValue)
member.summary: 判断是否是FormData，不包括FileName和FileNameStar字段 Content-Disposition: form-data; name="key";

member.name: M:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.MultipartRequestHelper.HasFileContentDisposition(Microsoft.Net.Http.Headers.ContentDispositionHeaderValue)
member.summary: 是否是文件类型。不为空，且包括FileName或FileNameStar字段，则认为是文件。 Content-Disposition: form-data; name="myfile1"; filename="Misc 002.jpg"

member.name: M:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.MultipartRequestHelper.GetEncoding(Microsoft.AspNetCore.WebUtilities.MultipartSection)
member.returns: 编码，若没有设置，默认为utf8

member.name: M:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.IRateLimiting.UpdateAndCheck(ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.IRateLimitingInfo)
member.summary: 更新限流信息并返回是否需要限流

member.name: T:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.MinuteRateLimitingInfo
member.summary: 以分钟为单位的限流对象

member.name: T:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.RateLimitingCache
member.summary: 实现限流接口。 用于缓存限流信息，并确认是否需要限流

member.name: M:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.RateLimitingHelper.AddThirdNetIpRateLimiting(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: 配置默认限流 默认使用按每分钟ip访问次数进行限制

member.name: M:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.RateLimitingHelper.AddThirdNetIpAndApplicationRateLimiting(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: 配置根据每分钟ip+application进行限流

member.name: M:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.RateLimitingHelper.AddThirdNetIpAndApplicationPathRateLimiting(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: 配置根据每分钟ip+application+url基地址进行限流

member.name: T:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.RateLimitingInfo
member.summary: 进行限流。 当前时间值和上一时间值的访问量大于阀值则限流
日志记录中间件，用于记录访问日志

member.name: M:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.RateLimitingMiddleware.Invoke(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext)
member.summary: 记录访问日志 先执行方法，后对执行的结果以及请求信息通过IVisitLogger进行日志记录

member.name: P:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.RateLimitingOption.Times
member.summary: 对应间隔最大的访问次数

member.name: T:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.HelpPageOptions
member.summary: 帮助页面相关默认信息

member.name: T:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.SwaggerAuthResponseFilter
member.summary: 添加需要认证操作提示帮助。 添加后，会展现当认证不通过时的错误提示。

member.name: T:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.SwaggerDefaultValues
member.summary: Represents the Swagger/Swashbuckle operation filter used to document the implicit API version parameter.
member.remarks: This is only required due to bugs in the . Once they are fixed and published, this class can be removed.

member.name: M:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.SwaggerHelper.UseThirdNetVersioningHelpPage(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.IApplicationBuilder,Asp.Versioning.ApiExplorer.IApiVersionDescriptionProvider,ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.HelpPageOptions)
member.summary: 加入版本化的帮助文件模块，并传入相关页面配置信息

member.name: M:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.SwaggerHelper.AddThirdNetVersioningHelpPage(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.HelpPageOptions)
member.summary: 配置版本化的帮助页面

member.name: M:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.SwaggerHelper.UseThirdNetHelpPage(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.IApplicationBuilder,ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.HelpPageOptions)
member.summary: 加入帮助文件模块，并传入相关页面配置信息

member.name: P:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.SwaggerHtmlRequestBody.Parameters
member.summary: 该类型对应的参数信息

member.name: P:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.SwaggerHtmlResponse.Parameters
member.summary: 该类型对应的参数信息

member.name: T:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.SwaggerIgnoreConvention
member.summary: 若Controller以ThirdNet开头，则不显示在帮助文档中。 定义相关规则忽略某些方法，设置其不在帮助页面展现。 个别指定可通过在方法标记[ApiExplorerSettings(IgnoreApi = true)]实现 通过services.AddMvc(c =>c.Conventions.Add(new ApiExplorerGetsOnlyConvention()));增加

member.name: M:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.SwaggerVersionConvention.Apply(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.ApplicationModels.ControllerModel)
member.summary: 设置版本信息,默认设置v1

member.name: M:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.ThirdNetDatabaseHelper.InitializeDatabase(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.IApplicationBuilder)
member.summary: 1.生成数据库 2.判断若表中无数据，则添加相关数据 添加账号：swkj_test，添加相应ip，添加权限admin

member.name: M:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.ThirdNetDatabaseHelper.InitializeFunctionTable(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.IApplicationBuilder,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: 初始化数据表，初始化ActionList表. 若ActionList为空，则自动获取系统中所有的api方法，加入数据库

member.name: M:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.WebApiException.#ctor(System.Net.HttpStatusCode,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: 使用指定的错误信息初始化

member.name: M:ThirdNet.Core.AspNetCore.WebApiException.#ctor(System.Net.HttpStatusCode,System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: 使用指定错误信息和对作为此异常原因的内部异常的引用来初始化
